<!-- Thanks for contributing to JobPilot! -->

## Summary
What does this change and why?

## Type
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Docs / agents (SKILL.md, knowledge)
- [ ] Chore / tooling

## Screenshots
If it touches the dashboard or landing, add before/after screenshots.

## Checklist
- [ ] `npm run audit:secrets` passes (no personal data committed)
- [ ] `npm run build` succeeds
- [ ] Demo mode still works (`npm run dev:app` with no `.env`)
- [ ] Docs updated if behavior or setup changed
- [ ] No service-account keys, `.env`, or generated personal files included
